underlying_goal: Execute a GSD phase (phase 36) with proper git workflow, CI monitoring, and signal collection
friction_detail: Claude committed directly to main without branching, pushed to fork but gh CLI defaulted to upstream repo causing confusion, and CI failed due to Node 22-only API used in Node 20 environment.
brief_summary: User ran automated phase execution workflow; Claude completed it but needed user corrections on branching strategy, fork awareness, and CI monitoring, then fixed a Node version compatibility bug.
